title: 8 Herbal Tinctures For Hot Flashes
description: Valeriana officinalis tinctures contains valerenic acid and isovaleric acid, which are the main biologically active constituents. These compounds have a sedative effect on the nervous system, helping to calm hot flashes caused by hormonal imbalances. Valerenic acid also blocks the activity of the neurotransmitter GABA, which can contribute to hot flashes. The antispasmodic properties of valerenic acid and isovaleric acid can also help to relieve the physical symptoms of hot flashes, su...
